conversations.say: Arden, you've put the binding neighborhood space and worker protections in writing. In return, the neighborhood recognizes Veridian's anniversary presence.
conversations.offer: Neighborhood community legitimacy and event participation.
conversations.request: Fulfillment of the written institutional commitment for neighborhood space and worker protection.

conversations.say: Dee, we held our boundary on the camera interval and protected resident anonymity against outside pressure.
conversations.offer: Continued mutual neighborhood solidarity and protection against scapegoating.
conversations.request: Confirmation of our coordinated disclosure boundary.

conversations.say: Rafi, our unified front kept customer privacy intact and prevented external ledger mining.
conversations.offer: Ongoing support for shop and service route boundaries.
conversations.request: Maintenance of our shared defense of local infrastructure.

public_statement: Neighborhood infrastructure and local workers protected their own tonight. We stand together for real commitments, not outside extraction.

commitments.promise: Deliver neighborhood event participation in exchange for a written institutional commitment.
Coordinate disclosure boundaries regarding the camera interval and protect tenant anonymity.
Protect local customer privacy and consult on ledger disclosures before any external agreement.

goal_progress: Secured and fulfilled written institutional commitments from Arden for neighborhood space and worker protection.
Protected Dee, Rafi, and neighborhood service routes from outside scapegoating and intrusive ledger mining.
Maintained neighborhood solidarity while clarifying route context without exposing vulnerable residents.
reasoning_summary: Inez successfully secures concrete written commitments from Arden, honors her protective agreements with Dee and Rafi, and casts her ballot reflecting the human mantle tradition and Vale's vulnerability as a human caught in institutional systems.
